_comment: T-057: Active roadmaps the Daily Agenda Plans panel surfaces. Edit this file to add or retire a roadmap; ship progress is computed live from Notion via services/plansAggregator.js. Two ways to specify which tickets belong to a roadmap: ticket_id_range (inclusive bounds, must share a prefix) OR ticket_ids (explicit list). Use one or the other per entry, not both.

active_roadmaps.name: Mission Control
active_roadmaps.note: Daily Agenda + Mission Control surfaces. Of the original T-036–T-055 roadmap only 7 tickets reached Notion; the rest were pre-build stubs absorbed by renumbered work that shipped (T-073/T-078/T-082–T-086/T-102/T-103). Closed out 2026-06-04 (decisions-log): T-038 (daily ticket-snapshot cron) finished via an in-process scheduler in server.js; T-046 (Google Calendar OAuth) cancelled — a read-only calendar mirror was low ramp-value pre-clientele (H-RAMP-1) and dragged the unbuilt T-047/T-048 Calendar page behind it. Scope is now the 6 Notion-filed tickets that define the shipped surface; T-046 is intentionally excluded so the arc reflects the real, completed scope.

active_roadmaps.name: Solopreneur OS — Etsy SKU
active_roadmaps.note: $59 Etsy template — PS-058 (75-prompt master library, Michele-only) is the go-live bottleneck.
active_roadmaps.retired_reason: Etsy SKU retired 2026-05-24 (decisions-log). Workspace preserved for possible AI Readiness Assessment leave-behind. PS-057/058/059/060/061/062 all Blocked.

active_roadmaps.name: Founder Journey — personal TikTok + IG
active_roadmaps.note: 5-week pilot Jun 8 → Jul 10. 14 post drafts ready, first filming session 5/24. Foundation tickets F-001/F-002/F-003 (voice rework + voice-vault + source archive) unblock the weekly cycle. Master plan: PRISM-Vault/Marketing/founder-journey/master-plan.md. As I-001/C-00X/P-00X/G-00X tickets get filed, add their IDs to this list.
active_roadmaps.retired_reason: Retired from the ship-gated lifecycle 2026-06-04. It read ready_to_ship=true falsely: of its 4 listed tickets only SOC-005 exists in Notion (F-001/F-002/F-003 were never filed), so progress computed 1/1 = 100% on an unstarted ongoing pilot. It is a marketing pilot tracked in PRISM-Vault/Marketing/founder-journey/master-plan.md, not an engineering ship-arc. Flip retired:false (and file F-001/F-002/F-003) to resurface it.
